creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mew14930xvi from comment #3)
The squirellmail provides every day a subversion-snapshot (see https://squirrelmail.org/download.php - 1.4.23-svn) even if nothing changed (the last change was at 27 Mar 2024). If I don't disable it I receive a notification every day. See https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/mail/squirrelmail?id=949980c8475e0bb2691da53f451a78e1dc82d63d
